name: RBZ

name: PAR
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Portfolio at risk: the share of a loan book overdue beyond a chosen day threshold.

name: Commission clawback
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Recovery of paid commission when a policy or facility lapses early.

name: KYC
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Know-your-customer checks at onboarding; statutory AML framework is a declared research gap.

name: Claim reserve
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The estimated liability held for a registered but unsettled claim.

name: Debit order / stop order
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Recurring collection instructions used for premiums and instalments.
